name: Jump Legal - Bankruptcy Attorneys
description_short: Jump Legal Group is a Columbus, Ohio-based bankruptcy law firm offering Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing, debt settlement, and creditor defense services with three convenient office locations.
description_long:
Jump Legal Group is a bankruptcy law firm based in Columbus, Ohio, operating under the brand of Mark Jump Bankruptcy Attorney. The firm maintains three convenient office locations throughout Columbus and focuses exclusively on debt relief and bankruptcy services for individuals and families in Ohio. According to their website, they have helped thousands of clients eliminate debt and navigate financial crises.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services including Chapter 7 bankruptcy (liquidation), Chapter 13 bankruptcy (repayment plans), and debt settlement options. Beyond bankruptcy filing, they provide specialized services addressing specific creditor collection tactics: wage garnishment prevention, car repossession defense, foreclosure defense, creditor harassment cessation, tax debt and tax lien resolution, credit card debt negotiation, payday loan relief, and student loan debt guidance. They also assist with lawsuits and provide guidance on avoiding legal action related to unpaid debts.

Jump Legal Group emphasizes personalized consultation and claims to offer affordable services without hidden fees. They highlight their attorneys' expertise in bankruptcy court proceedings and their ability to work quickly to protect clients' assets and income. The firm positions itself around client experience, noting that clients "always leave our law office feeling better than when they arrived." Free initial consultations are offered to assess individual situations.

The firm's primary limitation is geographic scope—services appear limited to Ohio residents and Columbus-area clients. While the website describes extensive experience, specific case outcomes, attorney credentials, or disciplinary history are not disclosed. The firm's marketing focuses on emotional pain points (sleepless nights, fear, creditor calls) rather than detailed legal strategy explanations, which may warrant independent verification of legal strategy suitability for individual circumstances.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Three convenient Columbus office locations for in-person consultations
Free initial consultation to assess bankruptcy and debt options
Explicitly states no hidden fees in their service model
Offers both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing services
Specializes in immediate debt collection intervention (wage garnishment, repossession, foreclosure defense)
Provides tax debt expertise with IRS debt elimination guidance
Claims experience helping thousands of Ohio residents eliminate debt
cons: Website provides no specific attorney credentials, bar associations, or disciplinary history disclosures
No client testimonials, case results, or success rate data published on website
Geographic limitation—services appear restricted to Ohio/Columbus area clients
No transparent fee structure displayed; costs must be discussed in consultation
Website content is marketing-focused rather than legally detailed, making it difficult to assess strategic approach
best_for: Ohio residents facing wage garnishment, repossession, or foreclosure needing immediate legal intervention
Individuals considering Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy with multiple debts (credit cards, tax, payday loans)
Homeowners in the Columbus area seeking to avoid foreclosure through bankruptcy or settlement options
diagnosis: Jump Legal Group is best suited for Ohio residents in the Columbus area facing active debt collection (wage garnishment, repossession, foreclosure) or considering bankruptcy protection. The main caveat is that specific attorney qualifications and case outcomes are not disclosed on the website, so prospective clients should independently verify credentials and discuss specific legal strategy during the free consultation before committing to services.
services: Tax debt and back tax elimination
Creditor harassment cessation and rights counseling
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: Industrious, Sutton Building, 875 N High St, Columbus, OH 43201
